center.name: 薩拉瓦蒂島
center.summary: 薩拉瓦蒂島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Barred rail、White-crowned cuckoo、Blue-black kingfisher等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: celebensis at Manado, Indonesia | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | authority = (Linnaeus, 1766) | synonyms = *Rallus torquatus *Hypotaenidia torquata }} The barred rail (Gallirallus torquatus) is a species of rail found across the Philippines, Sulawesi (Indonesia) and Salawati (western New Guinea)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in New Guinea and offshore islands of Salawati, Batanta and Yapen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Salawati and the Bird's Head Peninsula in New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |last5=Joseph |first5=Leo |date=2015 |title=Molecular phylogenetics suggests a New Guinean origin and frequent episodes of founder-event speciation in the nectarivorous lories and lorikeets (Aves: Psittaciformes) |url=https://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S1055790315001232 |journal=Molecular Phylogenetics and Evolution |language=en |volume=90 |pages=34–48 |doi=10.1016/j.ympev.2015.04.021|pmid=25929786 |bibcode=2015MolPE..90...34S |url-access=subscription }} It is native to New Guinea and the offshore islands of Batanta, Salawati and Yapen, where it inhabits a wide range of lowland and montane forest habitats

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in New Guinea and neighbouring Salawati Island

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The sole representative of the monotypic genus Seleucidis, the twelve-wired bird-of-paradise inhabits lowland and swamp forests, particularly throughout New Guinea and Salawati Island, Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The king bird-of-paradise is distributed throughout the majority of lowland New Guinea mainland, and on the surrounding islands, including Aru, Salawati, Missol, and Yapen, inhabiting mostly lowland rainforests, gallery forests, forest edges, and disturbed and tall secondary forests
